host_arn.description: Specifies the ARN of the host resource used for the connection. Must be a valid ARN of an existing AWS CodeStar Connections host.

name.description: Specifies the name of the CodeStar Connections connection, which must be unique within the AWS account.

provider_type.description: Specifies the authentication provider type for the connection, such as Bitbucket or GitHub.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the resource, supporting up to 50 tags.
